recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco

recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb become the galaxy's unlikeliest last hope when they must return the Death Star plans to the Rebel Alliance.

recommendations.title: Barbie Mariposa & the Fairy Princess
recommendations.overview: Join Mariposa and her new friend, Princess Catania, in this magical adventure to save the fairy land of Shimmervale. Together, the girls learn that with great friends, the sky is the limit.

recommendations.title: Dreambuilders
recommendations.overview: Minna, a young girl, misuses her newfound ability to create and control other people’s dreams to teach her bothersome stepsister a lesson. When her stepsister can no longer wake up, Minna has to enter the dream world to save her.

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

recommendations.title: WALL·E
